summary: Split p2pcd-types/src/lib.rs (1248 lines) into submodules: wire.rs, message_types.rs, scope.rs, handler.rs with lib.rs re-exporting

resolution.note: Split p2pcd-types/src/lib.rs (1253 lines) into wire.rs, scope.rs, handler.rs, message_types.rs. lib.rs keeps PeerId/constants/CapabilityDeclaration/DiscoveryManifest/WgPeerState/tests. pub use re-exports preserve all crate-level paths. cargo test --workspace --no-run passes.
